layout_description:
Option: OPT-1
Slide description: FULL-WIDTH WORKPLAN TABLE LAYOUT. The slide uses a two-region top-to-bottom structure: a compact title area (10% of slide height) followed by a dominant table container (87% of slide height, with 3% gap between them). The table is a dense 5-column × 5-workstream grid built as a Marvin Flat Geometry Table (Section 4 Option C). The layout maximizes vertical space for the table to accommodate substantial text content across workstreams, details, owners, and timeline deliverables. No outer content container is used — the table sits directly on the slide background with 3% left/right safe-area margins. The design prioritizes content legibility through minimal padding (dense content principle), dashed separator lines between workstream sections, and strict horizontal row alignment across all columns. Column headers use accent tabs and solid underlines (no filled header bars). Workstream label cells use light grey fill to anchor each row section visually. Timeline columns (2026 Q2, Q3, Q4, 2027) have light brand accent tint header backgrounds to distinguish them from descriptive columns (Workstream, Details, Owner(s)).

Blueprint:
  Orientation: top-to-bottom
  Regions: 2
  Allocation: [0.1, 0.87]

Containers:
  C0 (TITLE AREA): Compact title zone occupying 10% of slide height, positioned at the top of the slide with 3% left margin (aligned to the table left edge below). Contains two text elements stacked vertically: (1) Slide title 'Fund Accounting platform initiative workplan' in heading font, brand primary color, left-aligned, medium-to-large size. (2) Subtitle 'Deliverables against each workstream' in body font, brand text color, left-aligned, slightly smaller than title, positioned directly below title with minimal vertical gap (approximately 4–6pt). No background fill, no border — open space with text only. The yellow annotation box visible in the source image is editorial markup and must be removed entirely. A mandatory 3% vertical gap (approximately 16pt on a 540pt slide) separates the bottom of this title area from the top edge of the table container below. This gap is structural and non-negotiable to prevent overlap.
  C1 (FULL-WIDTH WORKPLAN TABLE): Dominant table container occupying 87% of slide height, starting at Y-coordinate = 13% of slide height (10% title area + 3% mandatory gap). Spans 94% of slide width (3% left/right safe-area margins). This is a 5-column × 5-workstream Marvin Flat Geometry Table (Section 4 Option C) built entirely from shapes and text boxes. COLUMN STRUCTURE (left to right, proportional widths): (1) Workstream column (18% of table width): Light grey filled cells, bold text, body font, brand text color, top-left aligned with small left inset (3–4pt). Contains 5 workstream labels: 'i. Conduct discovery', 'ii. Select and onboard partner', 'iii. Implement fund accounting platform – 3rd-party funds/BDC', 'iv. Implement fund accounting platform - Holdings', 'v. Implement fund accounting platform – non-loan investments'. Each workstream label cell spans the full vertical height of its workstream section (multiple sub-rows), vertically centered. (2) Details column (22% of table width): White background, body font, brand text color, top-left aligned with small left inset. Contains task descriptions, one per sub-row within each workstream section. Text wraps as needed. (3) Owner(s) column (20% of table width): White background, body font, brand text color, top-left aligned with small left inset. Contains owner assignments with role prefixes ('Finance/Ops:', 'Tech:') in regular weight followed by names in bold within the same text run. (4) 2026 Q2 column (15% of table width): Light brand accent tint header background (to distinguish timeline columns from descriptive columns). White cell backgrounds for data rows. Body font, brand text color, top-left aligned. Contains bullet points (brand-color circle bullets) for Q2 deliverables, one bullet list per sub-row. (5) Q3/Q4 + 2027 combined zone (25% of table width, split into two sub-columns of approximately 12.5% each): Light brand accent tint header backgrounds. White cell backgrounds for data rows. Body font, brand text color, top-left aligned. Contains bullet points for later timeline deliverables. HEADER ROW TREATMENT: No filled header bar. Column headers are bold text, body font size, brand text color, left-aligned with small left inset (3–4pt). Directly beneath each header label: a small accent tab (brand primary color, very thin height — 3–4pt, narrow width — 20–25% of column width, top corners slightly rounded, bottom edge square, left-aligned with header text, positioned fully below text with no overlap). Immediately below and touching the accent tab: a thin solid horizontal line (brand dark color, spanning full column width with small white gutters between columns — not a single full-width line). This three-layer treatment (text → accent tab → solid line) is applied to all 5 column headers. ROW STRUCTURE AND ALIGNMENT (CRITICAL): Each of the 5 workstreams is a major section containing multiple sub-rows. The number of sub-rows per workstream section is determined by the maximum row count needed across all columns for that workstream. For example, if workstream i has 3 detail items in the Details column, 2 owner assignments in the Owner(s) column, and 3 deliverables in the 2026 Q2 column, then workstream i section has 3 sub-rows, and all 5 columns must subdivide their workstream i space into 3 equal-height sub-rows using flexGrow. Empty cells (where a column has fewer items than the maximum) remain white with no content. This ensures that row 1 top edge in the Workstream column aligns exactly with row 1 top edge in Details, Owner(s), 2026 Q2, Q3, Q4, and 2027 columns. All sub-rows within a workstream section use equal flexGrow values to distribute vertical space evenly. ROW SEPARATORS: Thin dashed grey horizontal lines (light grey, 1pt weight, dashed pattern) between workstream sections (between i and ii, between ii and iii, between iii and iv, between iv and v). Separators span the full table width from left edge to right edge. No separator after workstream v (last section). No separators within a workstream section between sub-rows — only between major workstream sections. CONTENT DENSITY AND SPACING: This is a DENSE slide with 5 workstreams and substantial text in Details, Owner(s), and timeline columns. Apply Beauty Principle 0.1: padding must be minimal. Internal cell padding reduced to 2–3pt on all sides to prevent content overflow. Dashed separator lines (Beauty Principle 0.10) are mandatory — they provide visual rhythm without consuming vertical space. Font size is uniform across all body text cells (Beauty Principle C6) — same body font size in Details, Owner(s), and all timeline columns. Do not reduce font size in individual cells to fit content; instead reduce padding first, then adjust row heights proportionally using flexGrow. VISUAL HIERARCHY: Workstream label cells (light grey fill, bold text) are the primary visual anchors. Accent tabs beneath column headers are secondary anchors. Timeline column headers (light brand accent tint backgrounds) visually distinguish the right side (timeline) from the left side (descriptive). ALIGNMENT PRECISION: All column left edges snap to a consistent vertical grid. All sub-row top edges within a workstream section align horizontally across all 5 columns at identical Y-coordinates (Beauty Principle B2). Dashed separator lines between workstream sections are at identical Y-coordinates across all columns. TABLE BACKGROUND: No outer container border or background fill. The table sits directly on the slide's white background. Individual cells have fills as described (light grey for workstream labels, white for all other data cells, light brand accent tint for timeline column headers only).
  SC-BOTTOM (DECORATIVE BACKGROUND LAYER): INACTIVE. The table container fills the slide effectively with high content density. No decorative background layer is needed for visual grouping or fill. Adding SC-BOTTOM would not provide visual benefit and would risk interfering with the table's clean geometry. No element is rendered.
  SC-TOP (OVERLAY CONNECTOR LAYER): INACTIVE. This slide does not contain cross-container connectors, arrows, or overlay elements. All content is contained within the single table structure (C1). No SC-TOP element is rendered.
